# cloudflare-workers-otel-utels

> Cloudflare Worker telemetry at the fetch boundary — OTLP traces / metrics / logs + utels error tracking + D1 Proxy that emits slow-query warnings. Use when adding observability to a Worker without touching handler code.

## Install

```bash
apm install mizchi/skills/cloudflare/workers-otel-utels
```

For a reproducible setup, declare it in `apm.yml` instead:

```yaml
dependencies:
  apm:
    - mizchi/skills/cloudflare/workers-otel-utels
```

then run `apm install`.

See [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) for what this skill does and when to use it.
<!-- apm:readme:end -->
